quick_skim.title: Onsager--Machlup functionals for McKean--Vlasov SDEs via Euler-type approximation
quick_skim.abstract: The Onsager--Machlup action functional provides a variational framework for characterizing the most probable transition paths of stochastic systems and plays an important role in the study of nonequilibrium fluctuations. Its extension to McKean--Vlasov stochastic differential equations is complicated by the intrinsic distribution dependence of the coefficients. In this paper, we address this difficulty by introducing an Euler-type approximation scheme based on classical, distribution-free stochastic differential equations. Combining the classical Onsager--Machlup theory with a convergence argument for the approximation sequence, we derive an explicit expression for the Onsager--Machlup functional associated with the McKean--Vlasov SDE. The proposed approach is constructive and extends to a broad class of distribution-dependent stochastic systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Onsager-Machlup functional as path integral for SDEs
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: Onsager-Machlup泛函提供SDE的路径积分变分框架
quick_skim.llm_evidence: Onsager-Machlup泛函提供SDE的路径积分变分框架
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: Onsager-Machlup泛函提供SDE的路径积分变分框架
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Extends Onsager-Machlup action functional to McKean-Vlasov SDEs via Euler-type approximation, providing a variational path integral formulation for distribution-dependent stochastic systems.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该工作将Onsager-Machlup作用泛函推广到McKean-Vlasov随机微分方程，通过欧拉型近似方案，为分布依赖的随机系统提供了变分路径积分公式。所得显式表达式刻画了最可能转移路径，扩展了经典路径积分理论的应用范围。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该工作将Onsager-Machlup作用泛函推广到McKean-Vlasov随机微分方程，通过欧拉型近似方案，为分布依赖的随机系统提供了变分路径积分公式。所得显式表达式刻画了最可能转移路径，扩展了经典路径积分理论的应用范围。

quick_skim.title: Semimartingale Optimal Transport with Jumps: A General Framework and Equivalent Formulations
quick_skim.abstract: We study a semimartingale optimal transport (SOT) problem where the cost depends on the full differential characteristics, and the minimisation is over all semimartingale laws with given marginals whose absolutely continuous characteristics lie in a prescribed closed convex set. Under only minimal assumptions of measurability, convexity, and lower semicontinuity on the cost function, we prove the existence of an optimal plan for SOT and establish a Kantorovich-type duality without time-regularity conditions. We further prove that SOT admits four equivalent formulations: (i) a Kantorovich duality formulation, (ii) a viscosity solution formulation of the Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman equation, (iii) a martingale solution formulation via Markovian projection, (iv) a PDE formulation via weak solutions of a non-local Fokker--Planck--Kolmogorov equation. The framework simultaneously generalises classical optimal transport, martingale optimal transport, Schrödinger bridge problems, and barycentric weak optimal transport.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Semimartingale optimal transport framework for marginals and cost
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 半鞅最优传输框架，处理边际分布和成本函数
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 半鞅最优传输框架，处理边际分布和成本函数
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 半鞅最优传输框架，处理边际分布和成本函数
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper develops a general semimartingale optimal transport framework with jumps, proving existence and duality, which is directly relevant to optimal transport in diffusion bridges.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文研究带跳的半鞅最优传输问题，在弱假设下证明了最优计划的存在性和Kantorovich对偶性。该框架适用于扩散桥中的最优传输，为求解薛定谔桥问题提供了理论工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文研究带跳的半鞅最优传输问题，在弱假设下证明了最优计划的存在性和Kantorovich对偶性。该框架适用于扩散桥中的最优传输，为求解薛定谔桥问题提供了理论工具。
